name: delete-3-rows
goal: Delete three rows from the plan (the Implementation, QA and Launch rows).

steps.note: Click the first unwanted row (Implementation) to select it.
Row selected: does the app bar show the ROW context with a visibly labelled Delete action (SR-IXC-13, SR-IXC-19)?
Ctrl+click a second row (QA) to add it to the selection, exactly as an Office user expects multi-select to work (SR-IXC-18).
Did the selection accumulate to two rows (Office Ctrl+click), or did selection simply move to QA? This documents whether platform multi-select is supported yet.
Press Del expecting to delete every selected row at once (SR-IXC-19).
How many rows did one Del press remove: both rows I tried to select, or only the last-selected one (finding on multi-delete)?
Recover: directly select the next unwanted row (Implementation).
Del to delete the selected row (SR-IXC-19).
Are all three target rows now gone via select+Del? Note how many discrete gestures a first-time user needed versus the single multi-select+Del they attempted.
